headline: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Textron (NYSE:TXT) And The Rest Of The Aerospace Segment
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the aerospace stocks, including Textron (NYSE:TXT) and its peers.
